sprint: Traveller Gateway -- Gate to First-Time Devices Only, Correct the Naming
task: Direct product feedback on the just-shipped Gateway scaffold: 'creator gateway should only come when there is no known login. its not actually creator gateway , its traveller gateway.' Two real corrections, both applied at the source. (1) Behavioural: js/app.js's bootstrapSession() previously called GatewaySequence.begin() unconditionally on every boot, regardless of whether this device already recognizes a Creator -- meaning a returning Creator would re-live 'Welcome, Traveller... I am Lumo... Guardian of Story Companions...' every single time they opened the app, a greeting explicitly written for someone Lumo has never met. Fixed by gating GatewaySequence.begin() on MagicCard.list().length===0 -- a device with a known Magic Card now skips the Gateway entirely (not merely auto-skipped-past) and boots straight into _afterGateway(), which is exactly today's own pre-Gateway Identity Gate ('Welcome back... show me your stars') a returning Creator already has. A missing MagicCard module (defensive, should not happen in production) degrades the same conservative way -- Gateway skipped, straight to _afterGateway() -- rather than risk showing the first-arrival ritual to a possibly-returning device it can't identify. (2) Naming: 'Creator Gateway' was simply wrong -- the whole point of Scenes 1-3 is Lumo greeting a Traveller (someone with no claimed identity yet), not a Creator (who already has one and skips this per fix #1 above); renamed to 'Traveller Gateway' throughout every live code comment and doc this sprint touches (js/gatewaySequence.js's own header, js/gatewayAudio.js, index.html, css/style.css's Gateway CSS section header, assets/audio/gateway/README.md) -- module/file/class identifiers (GatewaySequence, gatewaySequence.js, gatewayAudio.js, .gateway-* CSS classes) are left as the generic 'Gateway' name they already were, matching this codebase's own established 'Vihu Card -> World Card' precedent of renaming prose/copy while leaving already-generic internal identifiers alone. Verified via a new 4-assertion Playwright suite (a fresh zero-card device still shows the Gateway; a device with one known Magic Card never shows the Gateway at all and goes straight to the existing Identity Gate instead; the skip holds stable across repeated reloads once a card is known) plus the full existing 15-assertion Gateway suite from the prior sprint (one assertion's own test methodology updated -- an existing-card device no longer needs a click to skip the Gateway, since it's never shown in the first place; a new assertion added confirming that directly, not a relaxed check) -- all passing, zero regressions. No Theme Contract/Engine V2 Scene Model/Builder/Creator Governing Rules change; confined to js/app.js, js/gatewaySequence.js, js/gatewayAudio.js, index.html, css/style.css, assets/audio/gateway/README.md.
